method: Fields come from the linked manufacturer sources on the retrieval date; where a manufacturer is silent, a named authorized retailer is used and that record says so. Each source's covers list maps it to the fields it supports. Prices are list prices read manually from the manufacturers' own store pages (URL and date in the record) - no feeds or endpoints are scraped, and MOZA prices are withheld until an authorized data source exists. Null means no citable figure from a permitted source; the notes say why.

records.motorType: Custom direct-drive motor with FluxBarrier technology and carbon-fibre composite motor shaft

torque.note: Official wording: standard peak torque is 5 Nm; the Boost Kit 180 (sold separately) unlocks 8 Nm. No holding figure is published.

xbox.condition: Requires an Xbox-licensed Fanatec steering wheel (the Microsoft security chip is in the wheel)

requiredNotIncluded: Fanatec steering wheel with QR2 wheel-side

records.notes: Discontinued is a US-market call: delisted from the US store, described as available while supplies last, and replaced by the 2026 Podium DD; some regions still sell remaining stock.
